name: Obatzda (Cheese Spread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush and blend the Camembert cheese with butter until smooth.
2. Add the finely chopped onions to the mixture.
3. Stir in salt, pepper, and caraway seeds.
4. Gradually add beer, a little at a time, until the mixture reaches a spreadable consistency.
5. Refrigerate the mixture until ready to serve.
